mapper.select: SELECT * FROM reservation WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM reservation WHERE status = '待取书' AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY reserve_time ASC
SELECT * FROM reservation WHERE status = '待取书' AND expire_time < NOW() AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY expire_time ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE reservation SET status = '已取书', pickup_time = #{pickupTime} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE reservation SET status = '已取消', cancel_time = #{cancelTime} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM reservation WHERE user_no = #{userNo} AND book_item_id = #{bookItemId} AND status IN ('待取书', '已取书') AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(id) AS count, DATE_FORMAT(reserve_time, '%Y-%m') AS date FROM reservation WHERE book_no = #{bookNo} AND deleted = 0 AND reserve_time IS NOT NULL AND status != '已取消' GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(reserve_time, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT COUNT(id) AS count, DATE_FORMAT(reserve_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date FROM reservation WHERE deleted = 0 AND reserve_time IS NOT NULL AND status != '已取消'
AND reserve_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 WEEK)
AND reserve_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
AND reserve_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 2 MONTH)
AND reserve_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 MONTH)
AND reserve_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 WEEK)
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(reserve_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservation r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.user_no = u.username WHERE r.deleted = 0
AND u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userName}, '%')
AND r.user_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userNo}, '%')
AND r.book_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{bookName}, '%')
AND r.status = #{status}
